# Phase 4 — Warehouse Validation Report
## Customer Revenue Analytics — Solstice Apparel

*Generated by `python/validation/run_warehouse_validation.py` on 2026-07-18 01:08 UTC. Re-runnable at any time — this is the warehouse's standing health check, not a one-off audit.*

> **Phase 3 validated each table against its specification.**
> **Phase 4 validates the warehouse against itself.**

Every check below compares two independent derivations of the same truth, or asserts an invariant that must hold across tables. Nothing here re-runs a Phase 3 per-table check for its own sake: those questions are answered and stay answered.

**Why almost everything here is exact:** this phase compares the warehouse to itself, not sampled data to a business target. A tolerance would only hide a defect. No ED-008 statistical tolerances appear in Phase 4 — those exist for sampled-vs-target comparisons and belong to Phase 3. The only latitude given is cent-level on large money aggregates, for the float/decimal reason Phase 3.11 documented.

## Dim_Date Smoke Test (historical gap closed in Phase 4)

**7/7 PASS**

| Check | Name | Severity | Status | Evidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `D.1` | Row count is exactly 1096 (2023-2025 inclusive, 365+366+365) | BLOCKING | ✅ PASS | row_count=1096 |
| `D.2` | date_key is non-null and unique | BLOCKING | ✅ PASS | total_rows=1096; distinct_keys=1096 |
| `D.3` | full_date is non-null and unique | BLOCKING | ✅ PASS | total_rows=1096; distinct_dates=1096 |
| `D.4` | NOT NULL sweep across every NOT NULL column | BLOCKING | ✅ PASS | 1 row(s) |
| `D.5` | date_key matches YYYYMMDD of full_date | BLOCKING | ✅ PASS | mismatched_keys=0 |
| `D.6` | Calendar is contiguous with no missing days | BLOCKING | ✅ PASS | gap_count=0 |
| `D.7` | Calendar spans exactly 2023-01-01 through 2025-12-31 | BLOCKING | ✅ PASS | first_date=2023-01-01; last_date=2025-12-31 |

## Tier 1 - Vintage Coherence

**10/10 PASS**

| Check | Name | Severity | Status | Evidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `1.1` | Fact_Orders geography/acquisition channel still match the customer's current dimension row | BLOCKING | ✅ PASS | stale_rows=0 |
| `1.2` | No order predates its own customer's signup date | BLOCKING | ✅ PASS | impossible_orders=0 |
| `1.3` | Fact_Order_Lines unit_cost still matches the product's current unit_cost | BLOCKING | ✅ PASS | stale_rows=0 |
| `1.4` | Fact_Order_Lines denormalized customer/date still match the current header | BLOCKING | ✅ PASS | stale_rows=0 |
| `1.5` | Header net_revenue still equals SUM of its CURRENT lines (staleness detector, not a generator re-test) | BLOCKING | ✅ PASS | stale_orders=0 |
| `1.6` | Fact_Returns amounts still reconcile to the CURRENT line they reference | BLOCKING | ✅ PASS | stale_returns=0 |
| `1.7` | Campaign attribution still valid against the CURRENT Dim_Campaign windows | BLOCKING | ✅ PASS | misattributed_orders=0 |
| `1.8` | Campaign-attributed orders fall on a campaign_period_flag day in the CURRENT Dim_Date | BLOCKING | ✅ PASS | inconsistent_rows=0 |
| `1.9` | Snapshot final month still reflects the CURRENT Fact_Orders and Fact_Returns | BLOCKING | ✅ PASS | snapshot_orders=26299; actual_orders=26299; snapshot_net_revenue=1782971.91; actual_net_revenue=1782971.91 |
| `1.10` | Every customer's snapshot series still starts at their CURRENT signup month | BLOCKING | ✅ PASS | stale_series=0 |

## Tier 2 - Cross-Grain Aggregate Reconciliation

**8/8 PASS**

| Check | Name | Severity | Status | Evidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|

| `2.2` | Every order has at least one line and every line has a header (both directions) | BLOCKING | ✅ PASS | orders_without_lines=0; orders_referenced_by_lines=26299; total_orders=26299 |
| `2.3` | Returned units never exceed sold units, per line and in aggregate | BLOCKING | ✅ PASS | units_returned=6088; units_sold=36594; per_line_violations=0 |
| `2.4` | Refunds never exceed the revenue of the line they refund, in aggregate | BLOCKING | ✅ PASS | total_refunded=412899.58; total_line_net=2195871.49 |
| `2.5` | Snapshot per-customer final order count equals that customer's actual order count (all 8000 customers) | BLOCKING | ✅ PASS | mismatched_customers=0 |
| `2.6` | Snapshot per-customer final net revenue equals that customer's orders minus returns | BLOCKING | ✅ PASS | mismatched_customers=0 |
| `2.7` | is_first_order count equals the number of customers who ever ordered (two independent derivations) | BLOCKING | ✅ PASS | first_order_flags=7711; customers_who_ordered=7711 |
| `2.8` | is_first_order (Fact_Orders) agrees with months_since_first_purchase=0 (Snapshot) on the first-purchase month | BLOCKING | ✅ PASS | disagreements=0 |

## Findings Register

Advisory findings are **not defects**. They are business intelligence surfaced by validation — an unused campaign, or a narrative claim the data contradicts. Per the Phase 4 ruling, generated data is never modified to satisfy a narrative; the narrative is updated to match the evidence.

| Check | Finding | Evidence |
|---|---|---|
| `4b.7` | Customers who never purchased (expected: real signups that never converted) | finding_count=289 |
| `5.5` | Repeat-customer revenue concentration (original 'minority share' claim disproved | repeat_revenue_share_pct=82.37; repeat_revenue=1808776.11; total_revenue=2195871.49 |

| Item | Result |
|---|---|
| Tables validated | **12** (8 dimensions + 4 facts) |
| Validation suites executed | **4** |
| Total validation checks | **62** |
| Passed | **60** |

| Blocking failures | **0** |
| **Overall warehouse certification status** | ✅ **CERTIFIED — the warehouse can be trusted for analytics** |

**Can this warehouse be trusted for analytics? Yes.** Referential integrity holds across all 17 fact-to-parent relationships at a single instant; every fact derives from the same vintage of its parents; all four grains reconcile exactly; every KPI in `business_understanding.md` resolves to one number by two or more independent derivations; and Phases 5, 6, 7 and 10 are certified constructible on this data.
